# The bgx Lens — Personal Blog by bgx4k3p

> Personal blog covering cybersecurity, vulnerability management, AI, automation, and infrastructure topics. Written by Emil Chukalov, a security leader with 18+ years of experience.

## Topics
- Enterprise Vulnerability Management (EPSS, CVE prioritization, risk frameworks)
- AI and automation in cybersecurity
- Infrastructure automation (Proxmox, Ansible, AWX, Kubernetes)
- Linux administration and scripting
- Penetration testing and red team operations

## Author
Emil Chukalov — VP Director, Information Security Engineering
Certifications: CISSP, GSLC, GCSA, GCPN, GXPN, OSCP, CEH
Education: MS Computer Forensics (George Mason University)
